mapper.insert: INSERT INTO member_bank_account ( member_seq, bank_code, bank_account_no, account_holder_nm, verified_yn, crt_dtm ) VALUES ( #{member_seq}, #{bank_code}, #{bank_account_no}, #{account_holder_nm}, 0, now() )
mapper.update: UPDATE member_bank_account SET bank_code = #{bank_code}, bank_account_no = #{bank_account_no}, account_holder_nm = #{account_holder_nm}, verified_yn = 0, upd_dtm = now() WHERE bank_account_seq = #{bank_account_seq}
